blocks.content:
# Video showcase

A test-only guide exercising every video provider and source form. Not shipped as a bundled guide — it is parsed by unit tests with a simulated CDN base URL.

blocks.title: Native video from a fully-qualified URL (tiny sample)
Native video from a package-relative path
blocks.authorNote: Package-relative asset — resolves against the guide's fetched base URL. Point at a real tiny clip in the package's assets/ dir when hosting.
